ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., lecture, tutorial, laboratory) */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic covered in the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session starts */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ends */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor leading the session */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program the session belongs to */,
  "available_slots" INTEGER /* Number of available slots for the session */,
  "used_slots" INTEGER /* Number of used slots for the session */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_topics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., lecture hall, laboratory, tutorial room) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the resource (e.g., number of seats) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the resource */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status (e.g., available, occupied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_resources" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the resource is allocated to */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was allocated */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the resource is allocated */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the resource allocation ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource allocation (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_resources_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_resources_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, instructor, student) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., professor, teaching assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the user attended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who attended */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date the user attended the session */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's attendance (e.g., attended, absent) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_attendees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_attendees_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor (e.g., Dr., Prof.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the communication is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the communication */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the communication */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the notification is related to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
